prompt: I'm getting HikariCP connection timeout errors in product-service under load. Our Aurora PostgreSQL cluster allows a maximum of 1000 connections total. We normally run 8 pods but can scale to 20 at peak. How should I set maximum-pool-size and what other HikariCP settings matter for Aurora? Show the application-production.yml config.

assertions.text: Accounts for peak pod count (20) when calculating pool size, not just normal count (8)
Shows max-lifetime value and notes it must be less than Aurora's wait_timeout
Includes connection-timeout, idle-timeout, and leak-detection-threshold settings
Output is in application-production.yml YAML format under spring.datasource.hikari
